handwriting-signature-generator.title: Free Handwriting Signature Generator
handwriting-signature-generator.description: Create a natural-looking handwritten signature online. Our generator mimics real pen pressure and ink flow.
handwriting-signature-generator.intro: Generate an authentic, handwritten-style signature for your documents or email footer.

faqs.question: How do I create a handwritten signature without a scanner?
faqs.answer: You can use our **Handwriting Signature Generator** in 'Type' mode to select from over 30 handwritten fonts, or use 'Draw' mode to sign directly on your touchscreen or trackpad.

faqs.question: Can I use this handwritten signature for legal documents?
faqs.answer: Yes, generally. Electronic signatures created with our tool demonstrate intent and are widely accepted for business contracts, though specific high-security documents (like wills) may require wet ink.

faqs.question: How do I remove the background from my signature?
faqs.answer: Our tool automatically creates a **transparent background** PNG. You don't need Photoshop—just download and place it directly into Word or Google Docs.

cursive-signature-generator.title: Cursive Signature Generator
cursive-signature-generator.description: Professional cursive signature maker. Choose from elegant scripts and casual cursive fonts.
cursive-signature-generator.intro: Add a touch of class with a perfectly flowing cursive signature.

faqs.question: Is a cursive signature legally required?
faqs.answer: No, a signature does not technically have to be cursive to be legal. However, a **cursive signature** is harder to forge and looks more professional on contracts than printed text.

faqs.question: Which cursive font looks most like real handwriting?
faqs.answer: We recommend fonts like **Caveat**, **Cedarville Cursive**, or **Homemade Apple** in our generator for a casual, authentic look. For formal needs, try **Great Vibes**.

faqs.question: Can I change the slant of the cursive text?
faqs.answer: Yes! Use the 'Slant' slider in our **Cursive Signature Generator** to tilt your signature forward or backward, adding personal flair.

calligraphy-signature-generator.title: Calligraphy Signature Generator
calligraphy-signature-generator.description: Create beautiful calligraphy signatures for free. Perfect for wedding invitations, photography watermarks, and formal documents.
calligraphy-signature-generator.intro: Design an elegant, high-end calligraphy mark that stands out.

faqs.question: What is the best font for a calligraphy signature?
faqs.answer: For high-end elegance, fonts like **Great Vibes**, **Allura**, and **Pinyon Script** are top choices in our library. They feature widely looped ascenders perfect for formal use.

faqs.question: Can I use this as a watermark for photography?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. Generate your **calligraphy signature**, download the transparent PNG, and overlay it on your photos using any editor. It works perfectly as a watermark.

faqs.question: Is this tool free for wedding invitations?
faqs.answer: Yes, you can generate unlimited **calligraphy signatures** for free to use on wedding invites, save-the-dates, or thank you cards.

wet-ink-signature-generator.title: Wet Ink Signature Generator
wet-ink-signature-generator.description: Simulate the look of a wet ink signature digitally. Perfect for signing PDFs legally.
wet-ink-signature-generator.intro: Get the look of a real pen-on-paper signature without the scanner.

faqs.question: What is a 'Wet Ink' style signature?
faqs.answer: A **Wet Ink** style mimics the imperfections, pressure variations, and slight bleeding of a real pen on paper, making digital documents look like they were physically signed and scanned.

faqs.question: How do I make my digital signature look realistic?
faqs.answer: Enable the **'Ink Texture'** toggle in our generator. This adds subtle noise and roughness to the lines, removing the 'perfect' digital look.

faqs.question: Is it better to use Blue or Black ink?
faqs.answer: We recommend using **Navy Blue** (#1e293b). In the legal world, blue ink is often used to distinguish an original 'wet' signature from a black-and-white photocopy.

autograph-maker.title: Free Online Autograph Maker
autograph-maker.description: Design your own personal autograph. Fast, free, and downloadable as PNG.
autograph-maker.intro: Create a unique, stylized autograph for your personal brand.

faqs.question: What is the difference between a signature and an autograph?
faqs.answer: A signature is primarily for legal identification, while an **autograph** is a stylized, often artistic representation of a name, typically used by celebrities or for personal branding.

faqs.question: Can I use this autograph for my merchandise?
faqs.answer: Yes. You own the PNG image you generate. It's perfect for t-shirts, business cards, or email footers to build your personal brand.

faqs.question: How do I create a unique autograph?
faqs.answer: Try using our 'Draw' mode to experiment with fast, sweeping strokes, or pick a stylized font like **Dr Sugiyama** for a fast, celebrity-style look.
